info.name: NY Prepaid Subscription - Category Scoped Flow
info.description:
End-to-end prepaid subscription flow with category-scoped balance (categoryScopedPrepaidEnabled = true).

Scenario A — CAR driver subscribes to CAR plan → full ride cycle → CAR RideCredit balance deducted.
Scenario B — Same driver queues a SECOND plan while first is still active; verifies FIFO mechanism (second purchase has expiryDate=null until first is exhausted/expired).

With categoryScopedPrepaidEnabled=true each vehicle category has an independent RideCredit account. A CAR subscription credits only the CAR account; a CAR ride debits only the CAR account.

All PRE-FLIGHT SQL steps are in the first folder — run each against atlas_driver_offer_bpp before executing the API steps.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.
// Generate random test phone numbers and registration ONCE per collection run
console.log('[Prepaid] Test driver:', dNum, '| rider:', rNum, '| reg:', regNo);

item.name: DB - Enable Prepaid at Merchant Level

exec: pm.test('DB - Enable Prepaid at Merchant Level executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant SET prepaid_subscription_and_wallet_enabled = true WHERE short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER'"}

item.name: DB - Set Prepaid Threshold in transporter_config

exec: pm.test('DB - Set Prepaid Threshold in transporter_config executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.transporter_config SET subscription_config = jsonb_set(COALESCE(subscription_config::jsonb, '{}'), '{prepaidSubscriptionThreshold}', '100.0') WHERE merchant_operating_city_id IN (SELECT id FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city WHERE merchant_short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND city = 'Bangalore')"}

exec: pm.test('DB - Disable Old Subscription Toggle executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.transporter_config tc SET subscription = false, updated_at = now() FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m ON m.id = moc.merchant_id WHERE tc.merchant_operating_city_id = moc.id AND m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore'"}

exec: pm.test('DB - Insert PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION Config Row executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "INSERT INTO atlas_driver_offer_bpp.subscription_config (service_name, merchant_operating_city_id, merchant_id, allow_driver_fee_calc_schedule, allow_due_addition, allow_manual_payment_links, deep_link_expiry_time_in_minutes, generic_batch_size_for_jobs, generic_job_reschedule_time, is_triggered_at_end_ride, max_retry_count, payment_link_channel, payment_link_job_time, payment_service_name, send_deep_link, send_in_app_fcm_notifications, use_overlay_service, payout_service_name, default_city_vehicle_category, number_of_free_trial_rides, free_trial_rides_applicable, subscription_enabled_for_vehicle_categories, execution_enabled_for_vehicle_categories, is_subscription_enabled_at_category_level, enable_city_based_fee_switch, subscription_down, is_ui_enabled, autopay_enabled, show_manual_plans_in_ui, send_manual_payment_link_job_max_delay, manual_payment_link_rate_limit_expiry_seconds, enable_offers_for_members, created_at, updated_at) SELECT 'PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION', moc.id, m.id, false, false, false, 15, 30, 60, true, 4, 'WHATSAPP', 21600, 'Payment_Juspay', false, true, true, 'Payout_Juspay', 'CAR', 0, false, ARRAY['CAR','AUTO_CATEGORY','MOTORCYCLE']::text[], ARRAY['CAR','AUTO_CATEGORY','MOTORCYCLE']::text[], true, false, false, true, false, true, 43200, 21600, false, now(), now() FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc ON moc.merchant_id = m.id WHERE m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING"}

exec: pm.test('DB - Disable YATRI_SUBSCRIPTION UI executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.subscription_config sc SET is_ui_enabled = false, updated_at = now() FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m ON m.id = moc.merchant_id WHERE sc.merchant_operating_city_id = moc.id AND sc.service_name = 'YATRI_SUBSCRIPTION' AND m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore'"}

item.name: DB - Insert PREPAID CAR Plan (fee=1, credits=5000, 2-day validity)

exec: pm.test('DB - Insert PREPAID CAR Plan (fee=1, credits=5000, 2-day validity) executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "INSERT INTO atlas_driver_offer_bpp.plan (id, merchant_id, merchant_op_city_id, payment_mode, plan_type, name, description, max_amount, registration_amount, plan_base_amount, is_offer_applicable, max_credit_limit, free_ride_count, frequency, cgst_percentage, sgst_percentage, max_mandate_amount, subscribed_flag_toggle_allowed, is_deprecated, eligible_for_coin_discount, service_name, based_on_entity, vehicle_category, allow_strike_off, product_ownership_amount, billing_type, validity_in_days, is_fleet_owner_plan) SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, m.id, moc.id::text, 'MANUAL', 'SUBSCRIPTION', 'ECONOMY', 'Enjoy rides worth 5000 in 1!', 0, 1, 'RECHARGE_5000.0', true, 5000, 0, 'FLEXIBLE', 0.09, 0.09, 0, true, false, true, 'PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION', 'RIDE', 'CAR', true, 0, 'PREPAID', 2, false FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc ON moc.merchant_id = m.id WHERE m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING"}

exec: pm.test('DB - Enable categoryScopedPrepaidEnabled Flag executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "UPDATE atlas_driver_offer_bpp.transporter_config SET subscription_config = jsonb_set(COALESCE(subscription_config::jsonb, '{}'), '{categoryScopedPrepaidEnabled}', 'true') WHERE merchant_operating_city_id IN (SELECT id FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city WHERE merchant_short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND city = 'Bangalore')"}

item.name: DB - Insert PREPAID AUTO_CATEGORY Plan (fee=2, credits=3000)

exec: pm.test('DB - Insert PREPAID AUTO_CATEGORY Plan (fee=2, credits=3000) executed', function () {

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "INSERT INTO atlas_driver_offer_bpp.plan (id, merchant_id, merchant_op_city_id, payment_mode, plan_type, name, description, max_amount, registration_amount, plan_base_amount, is_offer_applicable, max_credit_limit, free_ride_count, frequency, cgst_percentage, sgst_percentage, max_mandate_amount, subscribed_flag_toggle_allowed, is_deprecated, eligible_for_coin_discount, service_name, based_on_entity, vehicle_category, allow_strike_off, product_ownership_amount, billing_type, validity_in_days, is_fleet_owner_plan) SELECT gen_random_uuid()::text, m.id, moc.id::text, 'MANUAL', 'SUBSCRIPTION', 'AUTO ECONOMY', 'Enjoy auto rides worth 3000 in 2!', 0, 2, 'RECHARGE_3000.0', true, 3000, 0, 'FLEXIBLE', 0.09, 0.09, 0, true, false, true, 'PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION', 'RIDE', 'AUTO_CATEGORY', true, 0, 'PREPAID', 2, false FROM atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant m JOIN atlas_driver_offer_bpp.merchant_operating_city moc ON moc.merchant_id = m.id WHERE m.short_id = 'NAMMA_YATRI_PARTNER' AND moc.city = 'Bangalore' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING"}
